title: microterus neglectus
intro: Microterus neglectus, also known as the Roundleaf Sandwort, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Roundleaf Sandwort include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
